name: Kraphong Khao Priao Wan (Sweet and Sour Fish )
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 4 half-inch thick fish steaks.
2. Marinade the fish by combining rice wine, light soy sauce, wheat flour, and rice flour in a bowl.
3. Dredge each fish steak in the marinade and let it stand for about an hour to infuse with flavor.
4. Heat oil for deep frying in a deep skillet or large wok over medium heat.
5. When the oil is hot, add the marinated fish steaks and turn once to cook through. Remove the fish when cooked and drain excess oil on serving platter.
6. Prepare the sauce by sautéing chopped onion and sweet pepper in a small pan until fragrant.
7. Add remaining ingredients (except pineapple) to the pan and simmer until slightly reduced.
8. Stir in cornstarch or rice flour to thicken the sauce, then add the pineapple and heat through.
9. Pour the prepared sauce over the fish and serve with steamed jasmine rice.
